zh.title: 赫胥黎预言全集 - 《美丽新世界》对人类未来的16条预言与验证 | Huxley Prophecies
zh.description: 英国作家奥尔德斯·赫胥黎（1894-1963）在《美丽新世界》(1932)和《重返美丽新世界》(1958)中对基因工程、情绪药物、消费主义控制、试管婴儿、娱乐至死等议题的预言性描写，及其与现实世界的对照验证。
zh.keywords: 赫胥黎,美丽新世界,Brave New World,反乌托邦,预言,基因工程,试管婴儿,消费主义,娱乐至死,索玛,soma,赫胥黎预言

en.title: Huxley Prophecies - 16 Predictions from Brave New World (1932) | Full Archive & Verification
en.description: Aldous Huxley's Brave New World (1932) and Brave New World Revisited (1958) anticipated genetic engineering, mood-altering drugs, consumerism as control, test-tube babies, and entertainment replacing thought. Full archive with real-world verification.
en.keywords: Aldous Huxley,Brave New World,dystopia,predictions,genetic engineering,test-tube babies,consumerism,soma,antidepressants,Huxley prophecy
en.ogTitle: Huxley Prophecies - Brave New World's Predictions vs Reality
en.ogDescription: 16 predictions from Aldous Huxley's Brave New World (1932) verified against the real world: genetic engineering, mood drugs, consumerism, IVF, and more.
en.twitterDescription: 16 predictions from Brave New World verified against reality: genetic engineering, antidepressants, IVF, consumerism as control, entertainment replacing thought.
